title: ophioderma simplex
intro: Ophioderma simplex, also known as the simple basket starfish, is not a plant but a species of starfish that belongs to the family Ophiuridae. However, I can provide information on a different species of plant called Ophioderma which is a genus of flowering plants in the family Celastraceae. Ophioderma plants are known for their medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where they are used to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Ophioderma plants include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be harnessed through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures.
